messages.content: You are a knowledgeable assistant that provides accurate, sourced information. Always prefer primary, official sources.

Quote GDPR Article 6(1) exactly, and provide the authoritative EUR-Lex link to the consolidated text anchored at Article 6. Include a pinpoint citation (Article 6(1)) and a clickable full URL. If a DOI exists, include it; otherwise state "No DOI assigned." Do not paraphrase. Keep the total under 120 words. Include clickable full URLs and DOIs; do not use placeholders.

First, I'll open the official EUR-Lex entry for Regulation (EU) 2016/679, navigate to the consolidated text at Article 6, capture the precise wording of paragraph 1, confirm a stable permalink for the anchor, check for any DOI, then quote Article 6(1) verbatim with the canonical URL
